title: Pegasus Profile
description: User profile referenced by job-finder, interview-prep, content-writer, weekly-review, and other Pegasus skills. Lives at ~/.pegasus/profile.json.

resume.description: Filesystem path to a resume file (HTML, PDF, or markdown).

skills.description: Top skills, comma-separated. Used by job-finder + content-writer.

bio.description: One-line elevator pitch, used as the source of truth for about-page copy.

examples.name: Jane Designer
examples.headline: Senior Product Designer
examples.skills: Figma, design systems, motion, prototyping, user research, accessibility
examples.bio: 7-year senior product designer focused on healthcare. Shipped consumer apps that 10M+ people use weekly.
